description:
To configure the auditd service to use the audisp-remote plug-in of the audispd audit event multiplexor, set the active directive in /etc/audit/plugins.d/au-remote.conf to yes. Restart the auditd service to apply configuration changes: 
$ sudo service auditd restart
rationale:
The auditd service does not include the ability to send audit
records to a centralized server for management directly. It does, however,
include a plug-in for audit event multiplexor (audispd) to pass audit records
to a remote server.
ocil:
To verify if audispd's au-remote plugin is active, run the following command: 
$ sudo grep active /etc/audit/plugins.d/au-remote.conf
If the plugin is active, the output will show yes.
title: Configure auditd to use audispd's remote logging daemon
